scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -n server,client,electron -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env DOER_DEV=1 electron ."
